chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 99 of 2019 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders as to maintainability. 27.02.2025 Mr. Abdul Samad Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Petitioner seeks regularization in a government department, as stated to have been terminated on 19.09.2013, however, present petition has been filed in 2019, the same is prima facie barred by laches. Furthermore, the termination order has not been challenged, however, regularization is sought. The said remain mutual contradictory, hence, misconceived. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
